3022990.name: Automobilista 2 - Endurance Pack Pt2
3022990.description:
The follow-up to Pt1 released on New Year´s eve lof 2023, Pt2 further boosts the endurance car roster in AMS2 with one new LMDh / GTP, two LMP2 and two GT3 / GTD cars.

Besides the Alpine A424 already previewed in the second V1.6 Dev Update and the Audi R8 LMS GT3 evo II as previewed in the first V1.6 Dev Update, Endurance Pack Pt2 also features the two LMP2 prototypes Oreca 07 and Ligier JS P217:

The french prototypes come in two generations of LMP2 rules, one with the Gibson V8 that equps both running under the restrictions mandated by the rules (525hp as per 2024 IMSA regulations), while Gen1 features the same prototypes running unrestricted Gibson V8s pulling over 600 HP.

Completing the pack, the Corvette Z06 GT3.R as the seventh contestant in our GT3 Gen2 class.
3022990.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲
*具有完全音频支持的语言
